Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT upgrade.upgrade, count(*) AS change 
FROM (SELECT * 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata 
WHERE resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata.upgrade != 0) AS upgrade JOIN (SELECT * 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata 
WHERE resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata.upgrade = 0) AS baseline ON baseline.bldg_id = upgrade.bldg_id 
WHERE baseline.applicability = true AND upgrade.applicability = true AND coalesce(abs(upgrade."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - baseline."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(upgrade."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" - baseline."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(upgrade."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption" - baseline."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(upgrade."out.propane.total.energy_consumption" - baseline."out.propane.total.energy_consumption"), 0) < 0.001 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/126fd2c5defd6fd0679b889348f809408e7654664eeb155427f56ef425890557/f3174d74-cabb-4b09-864c-86a066affb4e/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
